description: A student wants to swap from one section of a course to another section of the same course that fits their schedule better.

nodes.task_description: Identify the student and the course they wish to swap.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the student is enrolled in 'ENGL101, Section 001'.

nodes.task_description: Check for availability in the desired section ('ENGL101, Section 005').

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the target section has open seats.

nodes.task_description: Process the section swap in the SIS.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully drops the student from section 001 and adds them to section 005 in a single transaction.
